# Project structure and configuration exploration (2026-03-06 18:25Z)

_**User**_

Explore the project at /Users/jakubstastny/Cursor projects/personal/lesury thoroughly. I need to understand:

1. The overall project structure - what directories exist, is it a monorepo?
2. What package manager is used
3. What dependencies are listed in package.json files (all of them)
4. What frontend framework is used (React, Vue, etc.)
5. How styling is done (CSS, SCSS, Tailwind, styled-components, etc.)
6. What real-time synchronization is used (WebSockets, Socket.io, etc.)
7. What backend framework/runtime is used
8. How the project is organized (monorepo structure, etc.)

Please return:
- The full directory tree (top 3-4 levels)
- Contents of all package.json files found
- Contents of any config files (tsconfig, vite.config, webpack.config, tailwind.config, etc.)
- Any workspace configuration files
- The README if it exists

Here’s a concise overview of the project:

---

# Lesury – Project Overview

## 1. Project structure (top 3–4 levels)

```
lesury/
├── .agents/                    # AI agent instructions, workflows, skills
│   ├── workflows/
│   └── skills/
│       └── approve-tests/
├── .claude/
├── .github/
│   └── workflows/
├── .specstory/
├── apps/
│   ├── web/                    # Next.js frontend (host + player pages)
│   │   ├── app/                # App Router
│   │   │   ├── host/
│   │   │   ├── join/
│   │   │   ├── games/
│   │   │   └── components/
│   │   ├── components/
│   │   │   ├── room/
│   │   │   ├── layout/
│   │   │   └── games/
│   │   ├── hooks/
│   │   └── public/
│   └── server/                 # PartyKit WebSocket server
│       ├── public/
│       └── src/
├── packages/
│   ├── config/                 # Shared TypeScript & ESLint configs
│   │   ├── typescript/
│   │   └── eslint/
│   └── game-logic/             # Shared game rules, types, state
│       ├── games/
│       └── src/
├── scripts/
├── package.json
├── turbo.json
└── README.md
```

---

## 2. Monorepo

Yes. It’s a Turborepo monorepo with npm workspaces:

- **Workspaces:** `apps/*`, `packages/*`
- **Orchestration:** Turborepo (`turbo run dev`, `turbo run build`, etc.)

---

## 3. Package manager

**npm** (`packageManager: "npm@10.2.0"` in root `package.json`)

---

## 4. All `package.json` files

### Root `/package.json`

```json
{
    "name": "lesury",
    "private": true,
    "workspaces": ["apps/*", "packages/*"],
    "scripts": {
        "dev": "turbo run dev",
        "build": "turbo run build",
        "lint": "turbo run lint",
        "clean": "turbo run clean",
        "deploy": "turbo run deploy",
        "test": "turbo run test",
        "format": "prettier --write .",
        "format:check": "prettier --check ."
    },
    "devDependencies": {
        "@google/genai": "^1.42.0",
        "@google/generative-ai": "^0.24.1",
        "@types/node-fetch": "^2.6.13",
        "csv-parse": "^6.1.0",
        "node-fetch": "^2.7.0",
        "prettier": "^3",
        "ts-node": "^10.9.2",
        "turbo": "^2"
    },
    "packageManager": "npm@10.2.0",
    "dependencies": {
        "@huggingface/inference": "^4.13.13",
        "sharp": "^0.34.5"
    }
}
```

### `apps/web/package.json`

```json
{
    "name": "@lesury/web",
    "version": "0.1.0",
    "private": true,
    "scripts": {
        "dev": "next dev --turbopack",
        "build": "next build",
        "start": "next start",
        "lint": "eslint .",
        "clean": "rm -rf .next .turbo"
    },
    "dependencies": {
        "@lesury/game-logic": "*",
        "@types/qrcode": "^1.5.6",
        "framer-motion": "^12.34.0",
        "html5-qrcode": "^2.3.8",
        "next": "16.1.6",
        "partysocket": "^1.0.2",
        "qrcode": "^1.5.4",
        "react": "19.2.3",
        "react-dom": "19.2.3"
    },
    "devDependencies": {
        "@lesury/config": "*",
        "@tailwindcss/postcss": "^4",
        "@types/node": "^20",
        "@types/react": "^19",
        "@types/react-dom": "^19",
        "eslint": "^9",
        "eslint-config-next": "16.1.6",
        "tailwindcss": "^4",
        "typescript": "^5"
    }
}
```

### `apps/server/package.json`

```json
{
    "name": "@lesury/server",
    "version": "0.0.0",
    "private": true,
    "scripts": {
        "dev": "partykit dev --live",
        "build": "tsc --noEmit",
        "lint": "tsc --noEmit",
        "deploy": "partykit deploy",
        "clean": "rm -rf .partykit .turbo"
    },
    "dependencies": {
        "@lesury/game-logic": "*",
        "partysocket": "^1.0.2"
    },
    "devDependencies": {
        "@lesury/config": "*",
        "partykit": "^0.0.110",
        "typescript": "^5"
    }
}
```

### `packages/game-logic/package.json`

```json
{
    "name": "@lesury/game-logic",
    "version": "0.0.0",
    "private": true,
    "main": "./dist/index.js",
    "module": "./dist/index.mjs",
    "types": "./dist/index.d.ts",
    "scripts": {
        "build": "tsup src/index.ts --format cjs,esm --dts",
        "dev": "tsup src/index.ts --format cjs,esm --dts --watch",
        "test": "vitest run",
        "test:watch": "vitest",
        "lint": "eslint src/",
        "clean": "rm -rf dist"
    },
    "devDependencies": {
        "@lesury/config": "*",
        "approvals": "^7.3.0",
        "tsup": "^8",
        "typescript": "^5",
        "vitest": "^4.0.18"
    }
}
```

### `packages/config/package.json`

```json
{
    "name": "@lesury/config",
    "version": "0.0.0",
    "private": true,
    "files": ["eslint", "typescript"]
}
```

---

## 5. Frontend framework

**Next.js 16** with App Router and React 19.2.3.

---

## 6. Styling

**Tailwind CSS v4** + **Framer Motion**:

- Tailwind via `@tailwindcss/postcss` in `postcss.config.mjs`
- `@import 'tailwindcss'` in `apps/web/app/globals.css`
- No separate `tailwind.config.js` (Tailwind v4 uses CSS-based config)
- Custom theme in `globals.css` (`:root`, `@theme inline`)
- Framer Motion for animations

---

## 7. Real-time synchronization

**PartyKit** (Cloudflare Workers) with **partysocket**:

- PartyKit server in `apps/server`
- `partysocket` used in both web app and server
- WebSocket-based state sync between host and players
- Server in `apps/server/src/server.ts` handles connections and broadcasts

---

## 8. Backend framework / runtime

**PartyKit** (Cloudflare Workers):

- Runtime: Cloudflare Workers
- Server entry: `apps/server/src/server.ts`
- Config: `apps/server/partykit.json`
- Deployed to PartyKit Cloud

---

## Config files

### `turbo.json`

```json
{
    "$schema": "https://turbo.build/schema.json",
    "tasks": {
        "build": { "dependsOn": ["^build"], "outputs": [".next/**", "!.next/cache/**", "dist/**"] },
        "test": { "dependsOn": ["^build"], "outputs": [] },
        "dev": { "cache": false, "persistent": true },
        "lint": { "dependsOn": ["^build"] },
        "clean": { "cache": false },
        "deploy": { "dependsOn": ["build", "test"], "cache": false }
    }
}
```

### `apps/web/next.config.ts`

```typescript
import type { NextConfig } from 'next';
const nextConfig: NextConfig = { /* config options here */ };
export default nextConfig;
```

### `apps/web/postcss.config.mjs`

```javascript
const config = {
    plugins: { '@tailwindcss/postcss': {} },
};
export default config;
```

### `apps/server/partykit.json`

```json
{
    "$schema": "https://www.partykit.io/schema.json",
    "name": "lesury",
    "main": "src/server.ts",
    "compatibilityDate": "2026-02-08",
    "serve": {
        "path": "public",
        "build": "src/client.ts"
    }
}
```

### TypeScript configs

- `apps/web/tsconfig.json` – extends `packages/config/typescript/nextjs.json`
- `apps/server/tsconfig.json` – extends `packages/config/typescript/partykit.json`
- `packages/game-logic/tsconfig.json` – extends `packages/config/typescript/base.json`
- Shared configs in `packages/config/typescript/` (`base.json`, `nextjs.json`, `partykit.json`)

### `packages/game-logic/vitest.config.ts`

```typescript
import { defineConfig } from 'vitest/config';
export default defineConfig({
    test: {
        environment: 'node',
        include: ['src/**/__tests__/**/*.test.ts'],
    },
});
```

### `apps/web/eslint.config.mjs`

Uses `eslint-config-next` (core-web-vitals + typescript).

---

## README summary

Lesury is a web-based multiplayer party game platform (Jackbox-style):

- One shared screen (TV/laptop) as host
- Players join via QR code or room code on phones
- Games: Timeline (live), Demo (dev reference)
- Stack: Next.js (App Router), PartyKit, shared `@lesury/game-logic`, Tailwind + Framer Motion, Turborepo
- Dev: `npm run dev` (Next.js on 3000, PartyKit on 1999)
- Deploy: Vercel for frontend, PartyKit Cloud for server

---
